name: Segment
description: Segment is a customer data platform (CDP) that collects, cleans, and routes user event data to hundreds of analytics and marketing tools. The API lets you track events, identify users, manage sources and destinations, and query user profiles programmatically.

capabilities.name: track_event
capabilities.description: Record a user action or event with properties, sending it to all connected destinations for analytics and activation.

capabilities.name: identify_user
capabilities.description: Associate a user with their traits like email, name, and custom attributes for personalization and segmentation.

capabilities.name: group_user
capabilities.description: Associate a user with a group such as a company or organization, with group-level traits.

capabilities.name: list_sources
capabilities.description: Retrieve all configured data sources in the workspace with their connection status and settings.

capabilities.name: list_destinations
capabilities.description: Retrieve all configured destinations where event data is routed, with their enabled status and configuration.

capabilities.name: get_user_profile
capabilities.description: Retrieve the unified profile for a user including all traits, events, and computed properties from the Profile API.
